description_long: This object is a stylized, angular handgun with a predominantly metallic gray finish and bold blue accent lines running vertically along the grip and frame. The design features sharp, geometric contours, giving it a futuristic or sci-fi appearance. The grip is thick and blocky, with pronounced ridges and a squared-off base, while the trigger guard is large and angular, seamlessly integrated into the lower frame. The slide is flat-topped and rectangular, with a single circular barrel opening at the front and a recessed section along the side. No visible manufacturer markings or engravings are present, and the overall construction appears to be solid and robust. The magazine base is flush with the grip, maintaining the weapon's clean, minimalist lines.
description: A futuristic, angular handgun with a metallic gray body and blue vertical accents, featuring a blocky grip and a flat, rectangular slide. The design is minimalist and robust, with sharp geometric lines and no visible markings.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen from the rear, showing the squared-off grip and the flat back of the slide, with no visible details except the layered construction.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the blue vertical stripes along the grip and frame, the large angular trigger guard, and the recessed section on the slide.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the circular barrel opening and the flat, featureless face of the slide, emphasizing the weapon's geometric design.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same blue accents, angular grip, and integrated trigger guard, with the slide's recessed section visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is thick, blocky, and angular, with pronounced vertical ridges that provide both visual interest and potential grip enhancement. It features a smooth metallic finish with blue accent stripes running vertically, and the base is squared off without any finger grooves or ergonomic contouring. There are no visible logos, texturing, or embellishments, giving the grip a minimalist, futuristic appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large, angular, and seamlessly integrated into the lower frame, with a squared-off profile and thick construction. It lacks curvature or undercuts, and there are no visible reinforcements, texturing, or accessory rails, contributing to the weapon's geometric and minimalist design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and circular, set within a flat, rectangular slide. It has a plain, unadorned exterior with no visible threading, porting, or compensator features. The finish matches the rest of the handgun, with no markings or special treatments.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with only a recessed section along the side for visual contrast.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining the weapon's clean, angular lines. There are no finger rests, flares, logos, or texturing, and the base appears to be a simple extension of the grip's geometric design.
